prompt: Add a sleeve, and insert the green mermaid logo on the sleeve, and add subtle condensation droplets on the cup surface.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which features a white coffee cup with a green Starbucks mermaid logo. Add a standard coffee sleeve around the central portion of the cup. Place the green mermaid logo, identical in design to the one already on the cup, onto the front-center of this new sleeve. Finally, introduce subtle condensation droplets onto the white surface of the cup itself, specifically on the areas not covered by the sleeve or the lid.
objects: standard coffee sleeve around the central portion of the cup
green Starbucks mermaid logo on the front-center of the sleeve
subtle condensation droplets on the white surface of the cup (not covered by sleeve or lid)
